overall.description: A third-person perspective follows a character in a red coat walking through a rain-soaked urban environment at night. The scene transitions from a modern commercial street with purple-lit buildings to a historic district with grand architecture, finally opening into a plaza with illuminated water fountains. The heavy rainfall and wet reflective surfaces create a moody, atmospheric setting typical of high-end open-world video games.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet urban sidewalk at night, passing modern commercial buildings with purple accent lighting. Heavy rain creates reflective surfaces on the pavement while a pedestrian with an umbrella walks in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic building facade with grand staircase

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to a historic district as the character walks alongside a grand stone building with illuminated arched windows. A digital billboard glows on the facade while parked cars line the right side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with autumn trees and approaching fountains

segments.scene_description: The character turns left into a spacious urban plaza, leaving the street behind. Autumn trees with sparse foliage dot the open area while illuminated water fountains become visible in the distance. A pedestrian stands near the fountain holding an umbrella.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza with multiple active water fountains

events.description: passing close to tall water fountain with heavy spray misting the air

agents.ego_description: walking through plaza passing between multiple illuminated water fountains

entered.detail: high-pressure water columns shooting upward from fountain basin
contemporary building with glass facade visible beyond the plaza
flag mounted on pole near building entrance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the heart of the plaza, passing close to active water fountains that spray mist into the rainy air. Modern buildings with glass facades rise in the background while the character navigates between multiple fountain installations.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked city that transitions from a modern commercial street into a grand historic district and finally opens into a luminous urban plaza. It begins by following a character in a red coat along a wet sidewalk past purple-lit buildings, where heavy rain creates deep reflections on the pavement. As the character progresses, the environment shifts toward a historic district characterized by grand stone architecture with illuminated arched windows and glowing digital billboards. The scene then opens up as the character turns left away from the street and into a spacious plaza dotted with sparse autumn trees. Finally, the camera moves through the heart of the plaza, passing between active water fountains spraying mist into the air against a backdrop of towering glass facades.
